name: Neutron Holdings, Inc.
business: Lime provides short-term rentals of e-scooters and e-bikes to riders in approximately 230 cities across 29 countries, using a vertically integrated platform combining proprietary hardware, software, data, and tech-enabled operations.

exposures.sentence: Lime is the largest global shared micromobility business.

Within the Lime Supply App, predictive analytics prioritize tasks that we believe will drive the most value, such as repositioning vehicles from one location to another, charging, or maintenance using machine learning to forecast demand patterns to help optimize fleet placement.
